creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Hi,

if I try to build the devel/py-gobject port which is required for gimp (python-fu) and gnumeric I get the following error:

test -z "/usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/gtk-2.0/gi" || .././install-sh -c -d "/usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/gtk-2.0/gi"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 types.py module.py importer.py __init__.py '/usr/local/lib/python2.6/site-packages/gtk-2.0/gi'
'import site' failed; use -v for traceback
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<string>", line 2, in <module>
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.6/os.py", line 49, in <module>
    import posixpath as path
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.6/posixpath.py", line 16, in <module>
    import warnings
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.6/warnings.py", line 8, in <module>
    import types
  File "types.py", line 26, in <module>
    import gobject
ImportError: No module named gobject
gmake[3]: *** [install-pygiPYTHON] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/py-gobject/work/pygobject-2.26.0/gi'
gmake[2]: *** [install-am] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/py-gobject/work/pygobject-2.26.0/gi'
gmake[1]: *** [install-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/py-gobject/work/pygobject-2.26.0/gi'
gmake: *** [install-recursive] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/py-gobject.

How-To-Repeat: portmaster devel/py-gobject
